meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Break Through Basic App Limits
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master the Antigravity project template and leverage Claude Code to accelerate your journey from student to senior AI engineer.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are building isolated features instead of robust systems. The Antigravity project template provides a production-grade architectural scaffold, allowing you to bypass boilerplate and focus on complex logic. By integrating Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting, transforming your student projects into high-performance, industry-ready AI applications.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and you’re trapped in the 'Tutorial Purgatory' of simple CRUD apps. You have the syntax, but you lack the architecture to bridge the gap between a classroom exercise and a living, breathing SaaS product. The frustration isn't in your code; it’s in your scaffolding. 

Today, we shatter that ceiling. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you stop playing with toys and start engineering systems. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about commanding the machine to build with you, turning your vision into a scalable reality.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready environment that includes structured error handling and modular service patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise-grade AI project using the Antigravity template with TypeScript, modular middleware, and integrated logging.

steps.title: Configure the Context Engine
steps.description: Set up the state management layer to ensure your AI agent maintains memory across long-running sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a persistent vector-store context engine using the Antigravity state management pattern.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your specific application requirements into the template's existing service layers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and inject a secure authentication and user-role service layer.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement Auth service with JWT validation following the existing service pattern."

steps.title: Define Multi-Agent Orchestration
steps.description: Move beyond single-prompt apps by defining distinct worker agents managed by the Antigravity controller.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a multi-agent orchestration layer where a 'Planner' agent delegates tasks to 'Executor' agents.

steps.title: Stress Test and Refine
steps.description: Run automated architectural audits to ensure your project meets professional performance standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a full system audit of the current architecture and suggest performance optimizations for latency reduction.

pro_tips: Always define your interface definitions before letting Claude Code generate the implementation to prevent hallucinations.
Use the Antigravity 'dry-run' flag during scaffolding to visualize the folder structure before writing to disk.
Treat your agent prompts as version-controlled code; store them in a /prompts directory rather than hardcoding them in services.
Implement a circuit breaker pattern in your API calls to ensure your AI app doesn't crash when external LLM providers experience downtime.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your generated logic immediately; never commit code that lacks at least 70% coverage.
resources: System Design for AI Apps: https://systemdesign.ai
Clean Code Principles for Agents: https://github.com/clean-code-ai
content.next_steps: Once your core architecture is functional, focus on deploying your app to a staging environment and implementing telemetry to monitor agent performance in the wild.
content.conversion_block: Stop building small and start building smart. The gap between a student and a senior developer is the quality of the systems they manage. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
